title: Visual Armor Trim Descriptions
description: A Resource Pack that displays previews of Armor Trims on Smithing Templates or Trimmed Armor
body: Visual Armor Trim Descriptions is a resource pack that displays previews of armor trims in the lore text of applied armor pieces and smithing templates, allowing you to see them without applying a template or wearing the armor.![A demonstration of the resource pack's features, showing a preview of the armor trim next to the item or trim name.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b1c93e9d4df8ceb57f67db615c8f5e04ad19252.png)
